metadata.description: Run Sonnet and DeepSeek at Fable-grade — a per-model reliability harness for Claude Code.

plugins.name: fable-overclock
plugins.description: Per-model reliability harness: makes the model you run (Opus/Sonnet/DeepSeek) cite every figure, abstain instead of inventing, and cross-check with a second model. Ships a skill + an optional deterministic PreToolUse gate. stdlib-only, non-blocking.
